name: Science Lab
continuing_bonus: Income: 1 card D/R

name: Spokesperson
continuing_bonus: Play Research Icon : 1 Reputation

name: Science Museum
continuing_bonus: Play Research Icon : 1 CP

name: Medical Breakthrough
continuing_bonus: Income: Gain 1 CP

name: Basic Research*
instant_bonus: 1 CP per 2 different continent/animal icons; others get $2 for each CP you earn

name: Science Library*
continuing_bonus: ANY Research icon played : $2

name: Technology Institute
continuing_bonus: Income: 1 X-token

name: Expert on the Americas
continuing_bonus: Play Americas icon : free Kiosk

name: Expert on Europe
continuing_bonus: Play Europe icon : free 1-space enclosure

name: Expert on Australia
continuing_bonus: Play Australia icon : pouch 1 card from hand for 2 Appeal

name: Expert on Asia
continuing_bonus: Play Asia icon : free Pavilion

name: Expert on Africa
continuing_bonus: Play Africa icon : Clever (move an action card to space 1)

name: Global Breeding Program
continuing_bonus: Discard token from card to use as any icon when playing a base conservation project.

name: Engineer
continuing_bonus: Build a second building of the same kind each time you use the Build action.

name: Breeding Program
continuing_bonus: Discard token from card to use as any icon when playing a base conservation project.

name: Diversity Researcher
continuing_bonus: May cover rock & water spaces; ignore rock & water requirements
end_game_bonus: each pair water & rock icons : 2 Appeal

name: Federal Grants
continuing_bonus: Income: $3

name: Archeologist
continuing_bonus: When border space placement bonus taken, gain another free placement bonus

name: Release of Patents
instant_bonus: # Research icons : 1 CP (other players gain $2 per CP gained)

name: Migration Recordings
continuing_bonus: Each Release into the Wild conservation project : 1 CP; you may support each CP more than once.

name: Quarantine Lab*
continuing_bonus: Venom, Constriction, Hypnosis & Pilfering do not affect you

name: Waza Special Assignment*
instant_bonus: Choose Small or Large Animals; reveal cards from deck and add the first of the chosen type to hand
continuing_bonus: You can no longer play the other (unchosen) animal type; gain 2 Appeal per Small, or 4 Appeal per Large Animal played.

name: Waza Small Animals Program
continuing_bonus: Each time you play only Small Animals with the Animals action, play another SA and take 1 from the display

name: Expert in Small Animals
continuing_bonus: Cost to play Small Animals is reduced by $3

name: Expert in Large Animals
continuing_bonus: Cost to play Large Animals is reduced by $4

name: Sponsorship: Primates
continuing_bonus: Income: gain $3/$6/$9 per 1/3/5 Primates in your zoo.

name: Sponsorship: Reptiles
continuing_bonus: Income: gain $3/$6/$9 per 1/3/5 Reptiles in your zoo.

name: Sponsorship: Vultures
continuing_bonus: Income: gain $3/$6/$9 per 1/3/5 Bird in your zoo.

name: Sponsorship: Lions
continuing_bonus: Income: gain $3/$6/$9 per 1/3/5 Predator in your zoo.

name: Sponsorship: Elephants
continuing_bonus: Income: gain $3/$6/$9 per 1/3/5 Herbavore in your zoo.

name: Primatologist
continuing_bonus: Each time a Primate icon is played in ANY zoo, gain $3

name: Herpetologist
continuing_bonus: Each time a Reptile icon is played in ANY zoo, gain $3

name: Ornithologist
continuing_bonus: Each time a Bird icon is played in ANY zoo, gain $3

name: Expert in Predators
continuing_bonus: Each time a Predator icon is played in ANY zoo, gain $3

name: Expert in Herbavores
continuing_bonus: Each time a Herbavore icon is played in ANY zoo, gain $3

name: Hydrologist
continuing_bonus: Gain $1 for each space covered next to water

name: Geologist
continuing_bonus: Gain $1 for each space covered next to rocks

name: Meerkat Den
instant_bonus: Place the Meerkat Den special tile next to at least 1 Rock
continuing_bonus: Gain 2 Appeal each time you play a Herbivore icon

name: Penguin Pool
instant_bonus: Place the Penguin Pool special tile next to at least 1 Water
continuing_bonus: Gain 2 Appeal each time you play a Bird icon

name: Aquarium
instant_bonus: Place the Aquarium special tile next to at least 2 Water
continuing_bonus: Gain 2 Appeal each time you play a Water icon

name: Aerial Cableway
instant_bonus: Place the Aerial Cableway special tile next to at least 2 Rocks
continuing_bonus: Gain 2 Appeal each time you play a Rock icon

name: Baboon Rock
instant_bonus: Place the Baboon Rock special tile next to at least 1 Rock
continuing_bonus: Gain 2 Appeal each time you play a Primate icon

name: Rhesus Monkey Park
instant_bonus: Place the Rhesus Monkey Park special tile
continuing_bonus: Gain 1 X-token each time you play a Primate icon

name: Barred Owl Hut
instant_bonus: Place the Barred Owl Hut special tile
continuing_bonus: Draw 2 cards and keep 1 each time you play a Bird icon (Perception 2)

name: Sea Turtle Tank*
icons_gained: 1 Reptile + 1 Water                                (1 Reptile + 1 Sea Animal + 2 Water*)
instant_bonus: Place the Sea Turtle Tank special tile next to at least 1 Water
continuing_bonus: Sell up to 2 cards for $4 each when you play a Reptile icon (Sunbathing 2)

name: Polar Bear Exhibit
instant_bonus: Place the Polar Bear Exhibit special tile next to at least 1 Water
continuing_bonus: Each time a Bear icon is played in ANY zoo, gain 2 Appeal

name: Spotted Hyena Compound
instant_bonus: Place the Spotted Hyena Compound special tile next to at least 1 Rock
continuing_bonus: Play a Predator icon, reveal X # of cards & add 1 Animal to your hand with X=# of your Predator icons (Hunter X)

name: Okapi Stable
instant_bonus: Place the Okapi Stable special tile
continuing_bonus: Up to 3 times, when you play a Herbivore icon, play a Sponsor for $X where X=the card strength

name: Zoo School
instant_bonus: Place the Zoo School special tile on at least 2 border spaces; take 1 card deck/reputation; gain 1 Reputation + 1 CP

name: Adventure Playground
instant_bonus: Place the Adventure Playground special tile next to at least 1 Rock; gain 4 Appeal

name: Water Playground
instant_bonus: Place the Water Playground special tile next to at least 1 Water; gain 4 Appeal

name: Side Entrance
instant_bonus: Place the Side Entrance special tile on 2 border spaces (need not be adjacent to other buildings)
continuing_bonus: Income: Gain $2 per Building(except empty standard enclosures) next to this tile

name: Native Seabirds
instant_bonus: Gain 1 Appeal for each connected Water space
continuing_bonus: Each isolated Water space : 1 CP

name: Native Lizards
instant_bonus: Gain 1 Appeal for each connected Rock space
continuing_bonus: Each isolated Rock space : 1 CP

name: Native Farm Animals
instant_bonus: Gain 1 Appeal for each connected Border space without Buildings
continuing_bonus: Each group of 6 spaces without Buildings : 1 CP

name: Explorer
instant_bonus: Gain $2 for each different Continent and Animal icon in your zoo
continuing_bonus: Each time you gain a Continent or Animal icon not in your zoo, gain 1 Appeal + $2

name: Waza Large Animal Program
continuing_bonus: If you play a Large Animal, you may ignore 1 condition of your choice.

name: Free-Range New World Monkeys
instant_bonus: Gain 1 Appeal for each connected space with a placement Bonus
end_game_bonus: every 2 isolated spaces with a placement Bonus : 1 CP

name: Franchise Business
continuing_bonus: Income: $1 per Kiosk all other players have in their zoos

name: Marine Biologist
continuing_bonus: Each time a Sea Animal icon is playes into ANY zoo, gain$3

name: Farm Cat
end_game_bonus: 1 CP per Kiosk with 3 empty spaces adjacent; Max 3 CP

name: Conference on Europe
continuing_bonus: Each time you play a Europe icon into YOUR zoo, you may mark 1 Animal card

name: Conference on Australia
continuing_bonus: Each time you play an Australia icon into YOUR zoo, you may increase the size of a standard enclosure by 1 for free. If the enclosure is occupied, gain 2 Appeal.
end_game_bonus: Gain 1 Appeal for each Pouched card in your zoo.

name: Marine Research Expedition
continuing_bonus: Each time you play a Sea Animal icon into YOUR zoo, choose 1: Expedition OR Scuba Dive 1

name: Excavation Site
instant_bonus: Place Excavation Site tile; gain placement bonuses twice for this building
end_game_bonus: All placement bonuses on zoo are covered: 1 CP

name: Expansion Area
continuing_bonus: Treat all 3-space enclosures on a border space as 5-space enclosures
end_game_bonus: All border spaces are covered: 1 CP

name: Publications
instant_bonus: Make 1 Donation (you do not need to have your Association Action card upgraded)
continuing_bonus: When making a Donation, pay $1 less for each Science icon in your zoo.

name: Mascot Statue
instant_bonus: Place Mascot Statue tile; Gain 1 Appeal
continuing_bonus: Income: 1 Appeal
end_game_bonus: Gain 2 Appeal for each zoo with higher Appeal (score last)

name: Horse Whisperer
instant_bonus: Search the Discard pile for and 1 Petting Zoo Animal.
continuing_bonus: Each time a Petting Zoo Animal is playes into ANY zoo, gain $2.

name: Landscape Gardener
instant_bonus: Gain 1 Pavillion; Gain 1 Appeal for every Pavillion in your zoo.
continuing_bonus: Each time you build a Pavillion in your zoo, gain 1 X-marker (max. 1 per action)

name: Amazon House
instant_bonus: Place Amazon House tile next to at least 1 Rock + 1 Water space; gain 1 Reputation + 2 CP + 4 Appeal

name: Underwater Tunnel
instant_bonus: Place Underwater Tunnel tile on 2 Water spaces; Gain 2 Appeal
continuing_bonus: This tile can accommodate Sea Animals (max. 2 markers)
end_game_bonus: Gain 3/5 Appeal for 1/2 Aquariua adjacent to Underwater Tunnel

name: Reconstruction
instant_bonus: You may reposition up to 3 buildings and place 1 free Kiosk + 1 free Pavillion
continuing_bonus: Do not gain placement bonuses anymore
